summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Revenue Recovery Calculator feature. All 10 requirements successfully implemented and tested including mathematical accuracy, dynamic updates, proper styling, and CTA functionality.
passed_tests: Revenue Calculator section visible with title 'How Much Are You Losing?'
Monthly Revenue input field with $ prefix (default $50,000)
Calculator shows 'You're losing $2,500/mo' in red text for default values
Calculator shows 'Paiploy recovers ~$1,675' in emerald green text for default values
Calculator shows 'per month (67% avg recovery rate)' note
Calculator 'Start Free' CTA button links to /register correctly
Revenue input changes update calculated amounts dynamically
Slider changes update fail rate percentage and calculated amounts
Mathematical accuracy verified: 67% recovery rate calculations correct
Edge case testing: 1% and 20% fail rates work correctly
Proper color styling: red for losses, emerald green for recovery
All previous landing page sections render correctly (hero, features, comparison, pricing, footer)
CTA button navigation to register page works perfectly
